case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Initial broad scan of metrics across all components in the first 180 seconds

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Adservice CPU+2.3, latency+1.8; currencyservice latency+1.1; checkoutservice mem+2.1. Anomalies suggest adservice/cpu, currencyservice/latency, checkoutservice/mem as top candidates. Need deeper analysis.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 120-210s adservice metrics. CPU dev=+2.3 to +3.6 confirms sustained CPU anomaly. Logs show normal request counts. No trace evidence. Adservice_cpu remains top cause.
Adserving CPU spikes (dev+2.3-+3.6) dominate initial analysis. Currencyservice latency and checkoutservice memory anomalies follow as secondary factors.
